title_en: PlayStation Plus Game Catalog for July 2026 Headlined by Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora, Rise of the Ronin, and Two PS2 Classics
summary_en: Sony has confirmed the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog for July 2026, which is headlined by Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora, Rise of the Ronin, and two PS2 classics.
body_en:
Sony has confirmed the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog for July 2026, which is headlined by Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora, Rise of the Ronin, and two PS2 classics.
It’s worth remembering that Sony is still experimenting with the timing of new PS Plus game releases, which means the games will be released on varying dates throughout the month in the U.S., the UK and Japan. The full lineup will be available to play on July 21 in all other regions.
Here’s the lineup, courtesy of the PlayStation Blog .
Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
